Southeast Iceland.text:
Wind
In southeast, south or southeast 3 to 5, becoming variable 2 to 4 later. In northwest, cyclonic mainly easterly or northeasterly 4 to 6, increasing 6 to gale 8, occasionally severe gale 9 later.
Sea state
In southeast, slight or moderate. In northwest, moderate or rough, becoming rough or very rough.
Weather
In southeast, showers, fog patches. In northwest, rain.
Visibility
In southeast, moderate or good, occasionally very poor. In northwest, moderate or poor.
